summary: Client Portal Redesign - All 6 phases verified successfully. Hero section shows 'David, you're on track for a comfortable retirement' with 84% confidence gauge and 'On Track' badge. Plain English summary displays strengths and things to watch without jargon. 3 improvement action cards show +8%, +12%, +6% confidence impacts. Timeline shows 'Today Age 50' to 'Retirement Age 67' with '17 years to grow your wealth'. Advisor section shows 'Sarah Chen is looking after your plan' with Call/Email/Book Meeting buttons. No complexity elements found (no RadialBarChart, PieChart, allocation breakdowns, scenario tables, Monte Carlo percentiles).

issues: Console shows 'Failed to fetch' errors initially due to emergent-main.js intercepting fetch - data loads correctly on retry

critical_code_review_comments: PHASE 1 - Hero Section: PASS - Greeting with first name 'David', 84% confidence score, 'On Track' badge, green gauge arc
PHASE 2 - Plain English Summary: PASS - 'Your plan in plain English' heading, explains retirement at age 67 with $72,000/year, 3 Strengths and 2 Things to Watch listed
PHASE 3 - Improvement Actions: PASS - 3 action cards: 'Increase super contributions' (+8%), 'Delay retirement by 2 years' (+12%), 'Reduce planned spending by 10%' (+6%)
PHASE 4 - Timeline Visual: PASS - Shows 'Today Age 50' to 'Retirement Age 67' with '17 years to grow your wealth' text
PHASE 5 - Advisor Guidance: PASS - 'Sarah Chen is looking after your plan' with Call, Email, Book Meeting buttons
PHASE 6 - No Complexity: PASS - No RadialBarChart, No PieChart, No allocation breakdowns, No scenario tables, No Monte Carlo percentiles displayed
API Integration: PASS - /api/client-portal/dashboard/portal_001 returns client data, /api/hybrid-engine/calculate returns confidence_score 83.5
Refresh Button: PASS - Clicks successfully and reloads data
test_credentials: No auth required. Set localStorage: disclaimer_accepted='true', app_mode='personal'
seed_data_creation: None - used existing mock data in PORTAL_CLIENTS
context_for_next_testing_agent: Client portal redesign complete with 6 phases. All data-testid attributes working: client-portal, hero-section, hero-title, confidence-gauge, confidence-number, confidence-badge, plain-english-section, summary-heading, summary-text, strength-0/1/2, risk-0/1, actions-section, action-card-0/1/2, action-impact-0/1/2, timeline-section, timeline-bar, advisor-section, advisor-name, advisor-call-btn, advisor-email-btn, advisor-meeting-btn, refresh-btn. Compliance modal may appear - dismiss with 'I Understand & Accept' button.

phase_1_hero_section.details: Greeting 'David, you're on track for a comfortable retirement', 84% confidence gauge with green arc, 'On Track' badge

phase_2_plain_english_summary.details: 'Your plan in plain English' heading, explains retirement at 67 with $72,000/year income, 3 Strengths (savings rate, goals on track, diversified strategy), 2 Things to Watch (spending above standard, health costs)

phase_3_improvement_actions.details: 3 action cards: Increase super contributions (+8%), Delay retirement by 2 years (+12%), Reduce planned spending by 10% (+6%)

phase_4_timeline_visual.details: Timeline bar from 'Today Age 50' to 'Retirement Age 67', '17 years to grow your wealth' text

phase_5_advisor_guidance.details: 'Sarah Chen is looking after your plan' with Call, Email, Book Meeting buttons on dark card

phase_6_no_complexity.details: No RadialBarChart, No PieChart, No asset allocation pie chart, No net worth breakdown, No scenario tables, No Monte Carlo percentiles

api_integration.details: /api/client-portal/dashboard/portal_001 returns 200 with client data, /api/hybrid-engine/calculate returns 200 with confidence_score 83.5

refresh_button.details: Refresh button clicks successfully and reloads data (confidence still shows 84%)

mocked_apis_list: Hybrid engine confidence calculation (returns mock 83.5 score)
